subcodes.first_line: This is a night wherein the Pen lamenteth over that which hath befallen the letters of the Book at the hands of every distant oppressor [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذه لیله فیها ینوح القلم بما ورد علی احرف الکتاب من لدن کل ظالم بعید
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment, @consolation and comfort, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice
